reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar, siempre atienden bien. Lo unico que a veces los playeros dicen quedarse sin sistemas y solo cobran con efectivo, que para los que solo usamos billeteras virtuales es un bajon. Es una forma de no declarar lo que recaudan ese dia????
Lo bueno es el parque que tienen atras de la estacion.

(Translated by Google)
Great place, the service is always good. The only downside is that sometimes the attendants say their systems are down and they only accept cash, which is a real bummer for those of us who only use digital wallets. Is this a way of avoiding declaring their earnings for the day?
The good thing is the park they have behind the station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoaThEZUdBEAE

reviews.comment:
El día que caímos a cargar nafta, hacían 41° a la sombra, menos mal que el Burger estaba con el aire acondicionado, pudimos tomar algo, pasar un poco el calor y seguir viaje

(Translated by Google)
The day we stopped to fill up with gas, it was 41° in the shade. Luckily, Burger King had the air conditioning on, so we were able to grab something to drink, cool off a bit, and continue our journey.
